source_refs.section: public-safe topic: The code-tidying catalog is the first major part of the study graph.

summary: The code-tidying catalog is the first major part of the study graph.

summary: The theory section supplies the design-economics frame behind tidying decisions.

summary: Guard clauses are one of the small code-tidying practices.

summary: Dead-code deletion is treated as a small structural cleanup.

summary: Symmetry is a code-shaping tidy that makes similar code read similarly.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Early exits can make the main reading path clearer by moving exceptional cases o

summary: Early exits can make the main reading path clearer by moving exceptional cases out of the core flow.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Removing unused fragments lowers noise before aligning similar code into a clear

summary: Removing unused fragments lowers noise before aligning similar code into a clearer shape.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: A symmetric shape makes it easier to introduce a desired interface and migrate c

summary: A symmetric shape makes it easier to introduce a desired interface and migrate callers consistently.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: A wrapper or adapter can expose the boundary where hidden inputs should become e

summary: A wrapper or adapter can expose the boundary where hidden inputs should become explicit parameters.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Placing related code together can reveal a helper-sized subtask worth extracting

summary: Placing related code together can reveal a helper-sized subtask worth extracting.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Keeping declaration and initialization close makes named intermediate values eas

summary: Keeping declaration and initialization close makes named intermediate values easier to understand.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Both moves replace opaque expressions with names that carry intent, one for comp

summary: Both moves replace opaque expressions with names that carry intent, one for computed values and one for literals.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Gathering similar code makes the repeated subtask visible enough to extract as a

summary: Gathering similar code makes the repeated subtask visible enough to extract as a helper.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Collecting related fragments into one pile can be an intermediate step before a

summary: Collecting related fragments into one pile can be an intermediate step before a clean helper extraction.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Intentful comments and redundant comments are distinguished so comments remain u

summary: Intentful comments and redundant comments are distinguished so comments remain useful rather than noisy.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: The workflow rule mirrors the theory distinction between structure changes and b

summary: The workflow rule mirrors the theory distinction between structure changes and behavior changes.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: A chain of small tidies needs a conscious batch-size decision to avoid drifting

summary: A chain of small tidies needs a conscious batch-size decision to avoid drifting beyond the current goal.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Batch size and rhythm must be balanced between smooth progress and inexpensive r

summary: Batch size and rhythm must be balanced between smooth progress and inexpensive review feedback.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Tangled edits are a warning that structural and behavioral work may need to be s

summary: Tangled edits are a warning that structural and behavioral work may need to be split again.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: The timing decision depends on an economic tradeoff between current cost and fut

summary: The timing decision depends on an economic tradeoff between current cost and future value.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Economics evaluates structural changes by how they affect the cost of future beh

summary: Economics evaluates structural changes by how they affect the cost of future behavior changes.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Economic reasoning includes the timing of costs and benefits.

summary: Economic reasoning includes the timing of costs and benefits.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Time value and uncertainty explain why preserving future options can be worth a

summary: Time value and uncertainty explain why preserving future options can be worth a small present cost.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Reversible structure changes preserve options because they reduce the cost of ch

summary: Reversible structure changes preserve options because they reduce the cost of changing direction.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Reversible structural changes can reduce the risk created by tightly coupled dec

summary: Reversible structural changes can reduce the risk created by tightly coupled decisions.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Coupling matters because change cost is central to the cost of software.

summary: Coupling matters because change cost is central to the cost of software.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: If software cost follows change cost, decoupling is justified when it lowers exp

summary: If software cost follows change cost, decoupling is justified when it lowers expected change cost.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Reducing coupling often creates new boundaries, so cohesion must guide where tho

summary: Reducing coupling often creates new boundaries, so cohesion must guide where those boundaries belong.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: The theory of cohesion explains why related code placement can be a useful tidy.

summary: The theory of cohesion explains why related code placement can be a useful tidy.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: The source quality caveat applies to the whole graph because the private input w

summary: The source quality caveat applies to the whole graph because the private input was OCR-derived and not fully reviewed.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: Practice summaries should be used as paraphrased guidance rather than as exact s

summary: Practice summaries should be used as paraphrased guidance rather than as exact source wording.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: 작게 수행하고 복구 가능성을 남기는 판단은 죽은 코드 삭제를 더 안전한 정리로 만든다.

summary: 작게 수행하고 복구 가능성을 남기는 판단은 죽은 코드 삭제를 더 안전한 정리로 만든다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: 변동성이 클수록 선택권의 가치가 커진다는 관점은 설계 옵션 이론을 뒷받침한다.

summary: 변동성이 클수록 선택권의 가치가 커진다는 관점은 설계 옵션 이론을 뒷받침한다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: 되돌릴 수 있는 구조 변경을 선호하는 결정은 구조 변경을 학습 가능한 작은 선택으로 만든다.

summary: 되돌릴 수 있는 구조 변경을 선호하는 결정은 구조 변경을 학습 가능한 작은 선택으로 만든다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: naming clarity는 code tidying 범위의 작은 이해 개선이다.

summary: naming clarity는 code tidying 범위의 작은 이해 개선이다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: guarded flow tidy는 guard clauses와 함께 핵심 흐름을 드러낸다.

summary: guarded flow tidy는 guard clauses와 함께 핵심 흐름을 드러낸다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: interface narrowing은 새 인터페이스를 만들 때 호출 표면을 좁히는 판단이다.

summary: interface narrowing은 새 인터페이스를 만들 때 호출 표면을 좁히는 판단이다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-before decision은 행동 변경 전 이해 비용을 낮추는 관리 선택이다.

summary: tidy-before decision은 행동 변경 전 이해 비용을 낮추는 관리 선택이다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-after decision은 행동 변경 후 생긴 지식을 구조에 반영하는 선택이다.

summary: tidy-after decision은 행동 변경 후 생긴 지식을 구조에 반영하는 선택이다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: coupling signal은 함께 바뀌는 요소를 관찰해 결합을 판단하게 한다.

summary: coupling signal은 함께 바뀌는 요소를 관찰해 결합을 판단하게 한다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: cohesion signal은 같은 변경 이유가 가까이 있는지 판단하는 기준이다.

summary: cohesion signal은 같은 변경 이유가 가까이 있는지 판단하는 기준이다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy batch size는 정리 변경을 리뷰와 롤백 가능한 크기로 제한한다.

summary: tidy batch size는 정리 변경을 리뷰와 롤백 가능한 크기로 제한한다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: cosmetic drift risk는 의미 없는 정리 확대가 변경 목적을 흐릴 수 있음을 경고한다.

summary: cosmetic drift risk는 의미 없는 정리 확대가 변경 목적을 흐릴 수 있음을 경고한다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: option expiry는 정리 선택의 시간 가치 변화를 option 이론으로 해석한다.

summary: option expiry는 정리 선택의 시간 가치 변화를 option 이론으로 해석한다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-before와 tidy-after는 같은 정리라도 행동 변경 전후의 정보 상태가 다르다.

summary: tidy-before와 tidy-after는 같은 정리라도 행동 변경 전후의 정보 상태가 다르다.

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: batch size가 커질수록 cosmetic drift risk를 더 엄격히 봐야 한다.
